I'll probably just hang on to them for use down the road, but unfortunately it won't be for awhile! Photo is comparison of this shoe to my kiddos other size 8T tennis shoes we just bought.

title: Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe
description: A bit like running in the clouds. Thanks to the increased elasticity of the upper and the super-soft cushioning throughout the length, these men's running shoes are the ultimate comfort. Super soft cushioning. The revised ratio between midsole and outer sole allows you to increase LOFT DNA to achieve even more extreme softness at the sole of the foot, without losing reactivity or endurance. An OrthoLiteTM insole ensures an extraordinary wearing comfort.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin 18 is perfect for runners who think there's no such thing as too much cushioning. The upper enhances comfort by perfectly balancing stretch and structure.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides neutral support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Glycerin 17.

SUPER-SOFT CUSHIONING: Increased DNA LOFT super-soft cushioning allows for even more extreme softness, without losing responsiveness or durability, while the OrthoLite sockliner provides premium step-in comfort.
PLUSH FIT: The plush feel of an internal stretch bootie surrounds your foot and moves and expands with your stride. The engineered mesh upper enhances the fit.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: The plush transition zone makes every move from heel to toe feel incredibly soft and smooth.

reviews.title: My Shoe!
reviews.text: These are the only shoes I have been wearing on a daily basis for over 10 years, Brooks Glycerin. My feet have seen many years of 12 hour shifts and are in sad shape. I have a dress pair, a pair I wear indoors, and several pairs for outdoors and yard work.  I can wear a man's 8 1/2 D or a Women's 9 1/2 wide and they fit perfectly.  If you need a cushioned shoe with good support these are the ones to buy.

reviews.title: Enjoying walking again
reviews.text: I'm a size 10.5 on one foot and just barely over a 10 on the other foot. These fit well and work for both feet. I walk 1 to 2 miles a day and was having intense pain in my shins and feet. I did some research and ended up chosing this pair. While these shoes have not gotten rid of all the pain, they have alleviated most of it. It makes me confident that most of the pain from walking was in having the wrong footwear.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe
description:
After 18 years of innovation, the Nimbus® series continues as one of the most recognized high performing footwear by ASICS. The new gel® placement offers modernized geometry of cushioning, designed to improve adaptability and mitigate brisk impacts. Improved guidance line® technology harmoniously syncs componentry to embrace the motions of the runner gait cycle.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FluidRide: FluidRide  provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement on multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidFit:  ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
Seamless construction

reviews.text: I absolutely love these shoes! They run about a half of a size too big. I normally wear an 8.5,which is what I ordered. But these are definitely not an 8.5,more like a 9. The width of the 8.5 is good, if you have wider feet. Not sure how a correct size would fit the width. All around pretty good shoe for the money.

title: Brooks Women's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Beware of imposters
reviews.text:
My original Brooks ripped in the seam so I ordered a new pair in Amazon. When they came they did not fit like my old ones at all.
I ended up contacting BrooksRunning directly and received the pair from them. TOTALLY PERFECT!!
What a difference from the ones purchased in Amazon. Even the labeling is different. Brooks is one of the most comfortable sneakers I have ever owned. I have four pairs. I did not have any luck through Amazon.

reviews.title: So comfortable!
reviews.text: Comfortable, good support, walked over 9 miles without blisters.  The laces were too short, but over all I highly recommend.

reviews.title: The perfect shoe for me.
reviews.text:
This is the third iteration of Brooks' Ghost running shoe that I've purchased. I have 8, 9, and now 14. These are the most comfortable shoes I own. They're supportive, have enough room in the toe box, and cushioning in the soles.
I'm glad they come in solid colors as well as multicolored. I plan to buy another pair of Ghost 14 in the solid grey option.

reviews.title: Comfy must-buy

title: New Balance Kid's 519 V2 Alternative Closure Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 519v2 kids' performance shoe is made with a versatile upper and a signature REVlite midsole to form a classic shoe that's comfortable, durable and pairs effortlessly with all of your kid's go-to gear. This pair of running shoes for kids is designed with no-sew overlays to help ensure a top-notch fit and a sleek feel that's perfect for all-day, any-day wear. The synthetic and mesh construction offers breathability and a proper fit, so your little one can tackle whatever their day throws at them, from recess shenanigans with friends to after-school practice. Best of all is the cool style of these cushioned running shoes for kids. Fun, playful colors and eye-catching patterns make for a pair of sneakers that fashion-conscious youngsters will love.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
Comfortable Kids' Running Shoes: Thanks to the REVlite midsole, which delivers incredibly lightweight cushioning, these kids' running shoes easily go from the classroom to the playground and beyond
Great Fit: Designed with no-sew overlays to ensure a sleek fit and incredible feel, these kids' performance shoes will be a joy to wear for your active little one
Breathable Comfort: The synthetic and mesh uppers on these New Balance kids' running shoes create amazing breathability, helping to keep their feet comfortable when the pace picks up
Incredible Support: With a strong and durable rubber outsole, these kids' shoes provide impressive support and can stand up to daily wear-and-tear, no matter what your child gets up to
Fun, Kid-Friendly Design: These shoes are designed for kids first, with playful colors, patterns and fun designs they're sure to love whether they're headed to school, practice or the park

title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: Are you looking for a lightweight, durable and supportive pair of trail running shoes? Then your search ends with the New Balance 510v5. Durability on the outside meets responsive comfort inside for a lightweight running shoe that's as ready as you are for a trail run or whatever else your day has in store. Built with a rugged construction, these New Balance trail shoes offer relentless durability that is suitable for various runs both on- and off-road. The lugged outsole on these comfortable running shoes features AT TREAD technology which provides enhanced traction on the trail or the road, while the lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole includes both ABZORB technology for impact absorption and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts. For added protection, the reinforced Toe Protect tip helps protect your toes from rocks, roots and debris so you can go off-road with confidence.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Textile
Imported
Rubber sole

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

reviews.title: Very good quality and comfort
reviews.text: This is my 2nd pair. Great quality and comfort. Nice looking too. True to size. Both pairs have lasted me a long time. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: New Balance shoes fit me the best of all the major brands.
reviews.text: I keep reordering New Balance shoes as previous pairs wear out.

reviews.title: good inexpensive trail shoes
reviews.text: these shoes have an aggressive tread, and for the price are going to be fine. The medium width is actually fairly wide, and my feet have plenty of room.

reviews.title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
reviews.text: I love New Balance Trail Running Shoes. Have purchased several pairs and they have lasted me for years. Very comfortable and durable kicks.

reviews.title: GREAT BUY
reviews.text: As good a shoe as some of the more expensive brands that I purchased in the past.

title: Brooks Womens Ghost 11 Running Shoe
description: The balanced cushioning helps to offer a smooth ride to the neutral runners looking for a versatile performance. With the new soft interior and a refined mesh upper, practically vanishes on the foot mainly thanks to the strategic position of stretch and Structure. Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot that sustains the foot every time it touches the ground and offers soft transitions and the BioMoGo DNA and DNA Loft cushioning even more assure every step of the foot.
features: mesh lining
Lace-Up closure
Machine Wash
SHOE SIZE: "B" = Medium width, "D" = Wide width
FOOT SUPPORT: Ideal for runners with a medium to high arch looking for neutral support.
BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability—yet it feels lighter than ever.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: The Segmented Crash Pad is designed to adapt to each foot fall, so no matter how your foot lands, you’ll enjoy the smoothest ride possible.
SOFT, SECURE FIT: The newly engineered mesh upper practically disappears on foot with strategically placed stretch and structure where you need it most.

reviews.title: Perfect pair of Running shoes
reviews.text: I’ve been wearing Brooks running shoes for about 4 years now and they do not disappoint. At first I thought the Ghost 11 would take some time to break in unlike my other Brooks running shoes. This was not the case as by day 2 they felt very comfortable. I will continue to wear Brooks running shoes. I am a fan. I’ve even convinced my husband to switch from New Balance to Brooks and he did.

reviews.title: Brooks are the best!!
reviews.text: Just love Brooks tennis shoes. This pair is probably my 4th or 5th pair from Brooks and I won't buy any other brand at this point they are so comfortable. Love the colors!!! Super fast shipping!!

reviews.title: Perfect for the gym.
reviews.text: I use these for the gym and love them.

reviews.title: Worth every cent!
reviews.text: Brooks always has the best shoes! These are dupe cute looking and wonderful for running/working out

reviews.title: Love running in Brooks!
reviews.text: I have been wearing brooks to run in for several years and just happened upon these at Amazon! Came quickly and perfect!

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 24 Running Shoes
description: The GEL-CUMULUS 24 (Wide) shoe is a versatile everyday trainer for various runners covering different distances. From the upper to the foam underfoot, this shoe feels softer and more responsive. To improve comfort, the upper features an improved heel fit. Meanwhile, the engineered mesh improves breathability to keep your feet cool throughout your run. This smooth distance trainer is also updated with our FF BLAST cushioning. It helps create a softer landing and a more responsive toe-off.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FF BLAST cushioning: Creates lightweight impact absorption and a responsive energy return.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Gender-specific 3D SPACE CONSTRUCTION feature addresses different compression rates:
Engineered mesh upper: Improves breathability.
Reflective accents: Improves visibility in low-light conditions.

reviews.title: No more shin splints/heel pain
reviews.text: First impression out of the box was not super impressed with the look/quality for the price. However, they feel incredible for walking/running. Only time will tell in regards to longevity.

reviews.title: Great for bad joints
reviews.text: These are great for joint and back pain. I’m on my feet all day and they’re like a firm cloud!  I tried the nimbus but they seemed too soft for hard surfaces. The were so cushiony but I could feel the hard floor in the ball of my foot so I use them for walking in nature and these for harder surfaces. Size up a half. I wear 9.5 Asics but for nimbus and cumulus I had to go to 10

reviews.title: Super comfortable
reviews.text: These feel like walking on pillows. They’re reeeeeally comfortable.

title: New Balance Men's Fresh Foam X Vongo V5 Running Shoe
description: The New Balance Fresh Foam X Vongo v5 running shoe for men is a luxurious combination of softness and stability. A Fresh Foam midsole provides plush underfoot cushioning for the long miles, while stability features in the midsole and upper offer comfortable support throughout your run.
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole
Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride
Hypoknit upper with embroidery for zonal support
Medial post helps control pronation
Lace-up closure for a secure fit
8 mm drop; due to variances created during the development and manufacturing processes, all references to 8 mm drop are approximate

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: My feet usually hurt, but these I can walk day and my feet feel great, and no pain.

reviews.title: Lacks comfort
reviews.text: Not a comfortable shoe! It runs too tight in the mid foot to toe box area of the shoe. If I could get a refund, I would! These are nice looking shoes but lacks in comfort and fit.

reviews.title: Nice shoe but lacks heel strap!
reviews.text: Comfortable shoe but hard to get the heel in shoe. Should have a heel strap. Would not have bought if I would have noticed this!

reviews.title: Nicely padded and breathable with multi-rubber soles for durability
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:fc87d73d73cdf58ce51bd49ab3a7a78e]] Very comfortable sneaker that is true to size and designed for running. Nonetheless, they provide maximum support and comfort for foot, knees, shins, and joints for any activity level. Pronation control helps better footing and wear of the sneaker. I am impressed by these and they have a lot of bounce that translates to more comfortable miles.

Trust you found this review honest and helpful:-)

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: I’m new into running but wanted a distance shoe (good cushion and support) and I am blown away at how good these feel. I usually wear a 10-10.5 but I wear an 11 in these (was fitting at a running shop). Went 2 miles this afternoon and was very happy with the responsiveness and comfort.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 5 Running Shoes
description: Go further than ever before with the GEL-CONTEND 5 extra wide width men's running shoe from ASICS. Created to offer the stability required to help you go the distance this shoe offers a supportive fit thanks to an internal heel counter. Features include a removable sockliner Rearfoot GEL technology and an AMPLIFOAM midsole which ensure your foot remains cushioned every step of the way. The solid rubber outsole and stitch-down toe reinforcement also mean it has a high level of durability while the breathable athletic mesh means that your feet stay fresher for longer as you take on new challenges. Proudly sporting our classic logo on the side you can rest assured that the GEL-CONTEND 5 shoe will give you comfort and protection when you need it most. Weight: 10.25. Heel Height: 22mm. Forefoot Height: 12mm.

reviews.title: Order 1 size larger
reviews.text: Fits great just like the old asics. Remember to order 1 size larger

reviews.title: Fit and price.
reviews.text: I have bought these twice before. I like the fit and I use them for daily use and running around. That’s why I didn’t rate them for working out. I use the ASICS 7 for power walking.

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.text: Not the best looking shoe, but very comfortable

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe
reviews.text: Very comfortable, nice fit.  We live in a cold climate so I bought these a half size larger to fit with thicker socks and that is perfect!
GOOD FIT.  USED WALKING.  PLAN TO RUN IN THEM
